isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric John Park & 1of1 - Take me

Romanization

bulbit wireul geotgo
sigeun ttame jeotgo
i gose
nae yoranhan mameul dul goseun eodie
soeumi hana dulssik
sarajineun bame
nae noraen
sarajyeobeoril padocheoreom peojine
domangchideut
hansunggan darana beorigo
muneojineungge
ijen mudyeojyeobeorigo
meonjiga ssaine dosi wiro
tto gireul ireobeorigesseo, byeol araeseo
sangcheoneun meomulda
sae sallo dodana
nae aneseo

take me to another stars
nan georireul hemego
nae aneseo nae maeumeseo
sinhoreul bonae jeo wiro
take me to another stars
nan bulbicheul hemego
nae aneseo kkumeul kkudeon
aireul bonae, bitnadeon

gateun bireul matgo
dareun kkumeul kkugo
nae anui
geurimjaneun nunnokdeut noganaerilgeoya
ujugateun nuneun
nae jonjaereul wirohago
ni anui eorinaineun byeoreul gidarideon neoya
dajimothal
georie naman namaseo
hajimothan majimak mari namasseo
adeukhi meona meon eodinggaro
ujureul geonneogayagesseo, neol hyanghaeseo
neol hyanghaeseo
du pareul ppeodeun maeum
byeolcheoreom dorawa
nan yeogiisseo

take me to another stars
nan georireul hemego
nae aneseo
nae maeumeseo
sinhoreul bonae jeo wiro
take me to another stars
nan bulbicheul hemego
nae aneseo
kkumeul kkudeon
aireul bonae, bitnadeon
byeol araeseo

Hangeul

불빛 위를 걷고
식은 땀에 젖고
이 곳에
내 요란한 맘을 둘 곳은 어디에
소음이 하나 둘씩
사라지는 밤에
내 노랜
사라져버릴 파도처럼 퍼지네
도망치듯
한순간 달아나 버리고
무너지는게
이젠 무뎌져버리고
먼지가 쌓이네 도시 위로
또 길을 잃어버리겠어, 별 아래서
상처는 머물다
새 살로 돋아나
내 안에서

take me to another stars
난 거리를 헤메고
내 안에서 내 마음에서
신호를 보내 저 위로
take me to another stars
난 불빛을 헤메고
내 안에서 꿈을 꾸던
아이를 보내, 빛나던

같은 비를 맞고
다른 꿈을 꾸고
내 안의
그림자는 눈녹듯 녹아내릴거야
우주같은 눈은
내 존재를 위로하고
니 안의 어린아이는 별을 기다리던 너야
닿지못할
거리에 나만 남아서
하지못한 마지막 말이 남았어
아득히 머나 먼 어딘가로
우주를 건너가야겠어, 널 향해서
널 향해서
두 팔을 뻗은 마음
별처럼 돌아와
난 여기있어

take me to another stars
난 거리를 헤메고
내 안에서
내 마음에서
신호를 보내 저 위로
take me to another stars
난 불빛을 헤메고
내 안에서
꿈을 꾸던
아이를 보내, 빛나던
별 아래서

isi.driveFileNames: Jihae Kimm & 1of1 - Count all the moons.mp3
isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Jihae Kimm & 1of1 - Count all the moons

Romanization

Even though you were right beside me, I still missed you like you are not around
cause I knew deep inside that you would leave me nonchalantly and just take your
flight
Count all the moons till we see each other again
Count all the moons till I’ll get all over you
I keep singing and singing though I knew
this song will never lead me to you
and when I looked into your eyes, I tried to capture all the colors
but the night came too fast and you said goodbye nonchalantly and just walked away
and now that you’re not beside me, I don’t know what to miss anymore
but I knew deep inside that you would leave me nonchalantly and just take your flight

Hangeul

Even though you were right beside me, I still missed you like you are not around
cause I knew deep inside that you would leave me nonchalantly and just take your
flight
Count all the moons till we see each other again
Count all the moons till I’ll get all over you
I keep singing and singing though I knew
this song will never lead me to you
and when I looked into your eyes, I tried to capture all the colors
but the night came too fast and you said goodbye nonchalantly and just walked away
and now that you’re not beside me, I don’t know what to miss anymore
but I knew deep inside that you would leave me nonchalantly and just take your flight

isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric CIFIKA & 1of1 - Heart to Heart

Romanization

neon eodiseo wanni
neodo moreuge heulleo deureowanni?
jasehi boni
neo, nal dalbaitguna
o gayeopgido haji (eum)
bicheul ireobeorin du nun
du gaeui jageun byeoreul
sanyangheda naenune
o jeogi bakkeuljom bwa
nuguneun saranghago
nuguneun sarasseumyeo

Woo urin jayuropge
sotguchineun maeume maedallyeo
saeroun ttang balbeureo
Woo geunyang amureoge
ssodanineun mal deulcheoreom
urineun ne ireobeorin mam chajeureo
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh

You’re from another world
I can feel, I can feel, somewhere bigger than my star
Tell me your Sega
Name of your neighbor galaxy
I can trace your memories
We can race on your melodies
Why you wander(ing) through the night?
I can take you to the Lost and found

Woo urin jayuropge
sotguchineun maeume maedallyeo
saeroun ttang balbeureo
Woo geunyang amureoge
ssodanineun maldeulcheoreom
urineun ne ireobeorin mam chajeureo

Heart to heart
Air to air
magu sotguchineun maeumdeure
Hold me tight
Break free
maedallyeo saeroun ttang balbeureo
Breathe in
Breathe out
nae sumi ttang kkeutkkaji
with or without you
Hard to tell
All I can tell
Is my love to you
All lost in you

Hangeul

넌 어디서 왔니
너도 모르게 흘러 들어왔니?
자세히 보니
너, 날 닯아있구나
오 가엾기도 하지 (음)
빛을 잃어버린 두 눈
두 개의 작은 별을
사냥헤다 내눈에
오 저기 밖을좀 봐
누구는 사랑하고
누구는 살았으며

Woo 우린 자유롭게
솟구치는 마음에 매달려
새로운 땅 밟으러
Woo 그냥 아무렇게
쏘다니는 말 들처럼
우리는 네 잃어버린 맘 찾으러
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh
Ohohohohohoh ohohohohoh

You’re from another world
I can feel, I can feel, somewhere bigger than my star
Tell me your Sega
Name of your neighbor galaxy
I can trace your memories
We can race on your melodies
Why you wander(ing) through the night?
I can take you to the Lost and found

Woo 우린 자유롭게
솟구치는 마음에 매달려
새로운 땅 밟으러
Woo 그냥 아무렇게
쏘다니는 말들처럼
우리는 네 잃어버린 맘 찾으러

Heart to heart
Air to air
마구 솟구치는 마음들에
Hold me tight
Break free
매달려 새로운 땅 밟으러
Breathe in
Breathe out
내 숨이 땅 끝까지
with or without you
Hard to tell
All I can tell
Is my love to you
All lost in you
